title: Lin's Permission
description: A pre class MOD for managing permissions, providing functionality for managing permission nodes and permission groups.
body:
A pre class MOD for managing permissions, providing functionality for managing permission nodes and permission groups.
The main function itself is to provide the functionality of permission nodes and permission groups, but currently these permission nodes and permission groups do not have much functionality if not added separately. You can use this MOD as a dependency to add permission nodes to your MOD and manage it using this MOD.
In addition, the function of a novice gift package has been added, which can be configured to choose whether to turn it on or not.
The settings for permissions and permission groups are located in the lin_perms folder of the corresponding archive folder. The contents of the novice gift pack are located in the configs folder. The commands added to this MOD all start with/linperms.
